debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
C : Category α
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
hf : IsIso f
⊢ @CategoryInContext.Category.Mono α C X Y f ∧ @CategoryInContext.Category.Epi α C X Y f

proof:
let ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
  constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hfg, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hgf, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc]
successful_attempts:
let ⟨g, hfg, hgf⟩ := hf
  constructor
  · intros W h k h_eq
    rw [← comp_id h, ← comp_id k, ← hfg, ← assoc, h_eq, assoc]
  · intros Z h k h_eq
    rw [← id_comp h, ← id_comp k, ← hgf, assoc, h_eq, ← assoc]
